name: FormStack
tagline: Beautiful, logic-driven forms and surveys that boost completion rates. Collect data, generate leads, and gather feedback. Free, with no response limits.
metaDescription: FormStack is a free form builder that replaces Typeform. Create beautiful surveys, lead gen forms, and quizzes with conditional logic, file uploads, and unlimited responses.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><text x="50" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-size="60">📋</text></svg>

features.title: Visual Form Builder
features.desc: Drag-and-drop editor with 30+ field types including ratings, file uploads, signatures, and payment fields. Design forms that match your brand without touching code.

features.title: Conditional Logic
features.desc: Show or hide fields based on previous answers. Create branching paths that adapt to each respondent, reducing form fatigue and boosting completion rates.

features.title: Real-Time Analytics
features.desc: Track submissions, completion rates, drop-off points, and average response times. Identify which questions cause abandonment and optimize your forms accordingly.

features.title: Payment Collection
features.desc: Accept payments directly through your forms with Stripe, PayPal, and Square integrations. Build order forms, donation pages, and checkout flows without a separate tool.

features.title: File Uploads & Storage
features.desc: Let respondents upload documents, images, and files up to 100MB each. All uploads are stored securely and organized by submission for easy retrieval.

features.title: Integrations & Webhooks
features.desc: Connect form submissions to 100+ apps including Google Sheets, Slack, HubSpot, and Mailchimp. Trigger webhooks for custom workflows on every submission.
